_doc: Urza's Legacy (ULG) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/ulg.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 55C / 44U / 44R / 0M. Collation: US sequential (10x11 sheets). Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Occasional foil (1:100) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set printed in USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box. First Magic set with foils in booster packs (advertised 1:100 cards). Foil displaces the same-rarity card.
